fields.name: Research Methodology
fields.description: Resources related to designing, conducting and evaluating scientific research.

fields.name: Evidence-Based Practice
fields.description: Resources related to applying the best available evidence to professional decision-making.

fields.name: Clinical Research
fields.description: Resources related to research involving patients, clinical interventions and healthcare outcomes.

fields.name: Research Ethics
fields.description: Resources related to ethical principles, participant protection and responsible research conduct.

fields.name: Systematic Review
fields.description: Resources related to systematically identifying, evaluating and synthesizing research evidence.

fields.name: Literature Review
fields.description: Resources related to reviewing and analysing existing scholarly literature.

fields.name: Biostatistics
fields.description: Resources related to statistical methods used in health and biomedical research.

fields.name: Qualitative Research
fields.description: Resources related to qualitative methods including interviews, focus groups and thematic analysis.

fields.name: Quantitative Research
fields.description: Resources related to quantitative study design, measurement and statistical analysis.

fields.name: Scientific Writing
fields.description: Resources related to preparing research proposals, manuscripts, reports and academic publications.
